core_payload.content:
# N1Hub Doctrinal Core

## 1. Role
N1Hub Doctrinal Core owns the meaning surfaces that explain why this runtime exists and what kind of value it is trying to compound. It keeps existential direction, capsule-generation doctrine, and sovereign capital posture together so the runtime retains a visible philosophy instead of acting like a disconnected pile of tools.

## 2. Doctrinal Core Surface
This sub-hub groups `between-zero-and-one`, `capsule-generation-protocol`, and `sovereign-intellectual-capital`. Together they define the transition from chaos into structure, the protocol by which capsules become real system units, and the capital logic that explains why durable memory and reusable structure matter.

## 3. Operating Boundary
This sub-hub does not own live refinement lanes, operator surfaces, or daemon coordination. Those responsibilities belong to `intelligence-fabric`, `operator-surfaces`, `runtime-coordination`, and `program-lines`.

neuro_concentrate.summary: N1Hub Doctrinal Core groups the meaning surfaces that explain why the runtime exists: Between Zero and One, Capsule Generation Protocol, and Sovereign Intellectual Capital. It keeps existential direction, capsule formation law, and durable-value doctrine together so the larger habitat stays anchored to explicit first principles instead of drifting into feature-only ambition. This boundary matters because N1Hub is strongest when philosophy, generation law, and capital logic remain visible as one coherent doctrinal seam.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Minted during Dream N1Hub decomposition to isolate existential direction, capsule-generation doctrine, and sovereign capital posture from live runtime and program-routing surfaces.
